title: BridgeResponseEnvelope
description: Standard envelope for all Atlas Bridge responses. Mirrors the BridgeResponseEnvelope struct in Shared/AtlasBridgeContract/include/AtlasBridgeTypes.h.

protocolVersion.description: Bridge protocol version string reported by the server.

requestId.description: Echoed requestId from the originating BridgeRequestEnvelope.

success.description: True when the operation completed without error.

errorCode.description: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE error code from BridgeErrorCode. Null or absent on success. Examples: INVALID_REQUEST, UNAUTHORIZED, NOT_FOUND, VALIDATION_FAILED.

message.description: Human-readable status message. Informational on success; describes the failure on error.

payload.description: Optional service-specific response data. Schema is defined per service/operation.
